postconditions: result == (head_same == 1 && pruned_boundary_same == 1 && pending_same == 1 && receipt_same == 1 && tx_index_same == 1 && tx_loc_same == 1)
acceptance_criteria: Upgrade observation preservation: after adapter restore/reinitialization, head, pruned boundary, current pending mapping, receipt payload, tx_index payload, and tx_loc must all match their pre-upgrade observations; IC runtime persistence is a trust boundary.

test_evidence.command: cargo test -p verified-core --test upgrade_safety upgrade_observation && cargo test -p evm-db --test phase0_stable_state stable_state_reinit_preserves_core_upgrade_observations
test_evidence.test_name: verified-core pure upgrade observation tests plus evm-db stable-state reinit adapter evidence
